title: sphaerocoryne gracilis
intro: Sphaerocoryne gracilis, also known as the 'gracilis sphaerocoryne' or 'gracilis water sprite', is a species of aquatic plant in the family Haloragaceae. It is native to Australia and is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of sphaerocoryne gracilis include its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce fever, while also providing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, sphaerocoryne gracilis is typically used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and is often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
